calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Granted. The parties must immediately inform the court of any communication from the Attorney General after the motion was filed.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)
